title: Csalad-Modpack
description: A modpack for my private minecraft server called Family-minecraft server.
body:
This modpack is made to improve the experience of my private minecraft server. So please **DO NOT** use this unless you want to play on my private server and you are my family member! 🤣

## Future updates 🏗️

However, since this modpack usually contains vanilla-friendly mods and texture packs that are very useful in any single-player world, I decided to make another version of this modpack that also contains all other mods on the server.


<details>
<summary>The mods currently in the Modpack (updated after each new modpack version)</summary>


- [Architectury Api](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) by [MayNeedSnacks](https://modrinth.com/user/MaxNeedsSnacks)(this is just a support mod)
- [Available Reinforced Deepslate](https://modrinth.com/datapack/reinforced_deepslate) by [vipvincent1107](https://modrinth.com/user/vipvincent1107) (allows you to mine reinforced deepslate)
- [Better Advancements](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-advancements) by [way2muchnoise](https://modrinth.com/user/way2muchnoise) (adds a better advancements ui to the game)
- [Better Beacon Placement](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-beacon-placement) by [Serilum](https://modrinth.com/user/Serilum) (for easier beacon placement)
- [Better Conduit Placement](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-conduit-placement) by [Serilum](https://modrinth.com/user/Serilum) (for easier conduit placement)
- [Better Recipe Book](https://modrinth.com/mod/brb) by [marshmallow](https://modrinth.com/user/marshmallow) (for better brewing, smithing and crafting)
- [Better Statistics Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-stats) by [TheCSDev](https://modrinth.com/user/TheCSDev) (for better statistics)
